# First steps - Installing QGIS

## Download and Install QGIS

Please follow the official documentation of QGIS for installation [here](https://docs.qgis.org/3.44/en/docs/user_manual/introduction/getting_started.html#installing-qgis). 

You can also try the net step in the guide, *Statring and stopping QGIS*

## Get to know the interface

The interface of QGIS is rich. The main documentation of the interface is [here](https://docs.qgis.org/3.44/en/docs/user_manual/introduction/qgis_gui.html).

The main parts are:

![](https://docs.qgis.org/3.44/en/_static/desktop_interface.png)

- The Menu bar at the top of the screen, which contains all the functions of QGIS;
- The Toolbars, which contain shortcuts to the most commonly used functions (this content can be modified);
- The Map View (where the map is displayed);
- The Browser Panel, which allows you to navigate your files and databases;
- The Layers Panel, which shows the layers currently loaded in the project and allows you to manage them;
- The Status Bar at the bottom of the screen, which shows information about the current map view and the project.
